lines.english: Lesson 121
lines.raw: Lesson 121 | 第121课

lines.english: The man in a hat
lines.raw: The man in a hat  | 戴帽子的男人

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question.  | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Why didn't Caroline recognize the customer straight away?
lines.chinese: 为什么卡罗琳没有立刻认出这位顾客？
lines.raw: Why didn't Caroline recognize the customer straight away?  | 为什么卡罗琳没有立刻认出这位顾客？

lines.english: I bought two expensive dictionaries here half an hour ago, but I forgot to take them with me.
lines.chinese: 半小时前我在这儿买了词典，可是我忘记把它们带走了。
lines.raw: I bought two expensive dictionaries here half an hour ago, but I forgot to take them with me.  | 半小时前我在这儿买了词典，可是我忘记把它们带走了。

lines.english: Who served you, sir?
lines.raw: Who served you, sir?  | 是谁为您服务的，先生？

lines.english: The lady who is standing behind the counter.
lines.chinese: 是那位站在柜台后面的女士。
lines.raw: The lady who is standing behind the counter.  | 是那位站在柜台后面的女士。

lines.english: Which books did you buy?
lines.raw: Which books did you buy?  | 您买的是哪些书？

lines.english: The books which are on the counter.
lines.raw: The books which are on the counter.  | 是柜台上的那些书。

lines.english: Did you serve this gentleman half an hour ago, Caroline?
lines.chinese: 半小时前你为这位先生服务过吗，卡罗琳？
lines.raw: Did you serve this gentleman half an hour ago, Caroline?  | 半小时前你为这位先生服务过吗，卡罗琳？

lines.english: He says he's the man who bought these books.
lines.chinese: 他说他就是买这些书的人。
lines.raw: He says he's the man who bought these books.  | 他说他就是买这些书的人。

lines.english: I can't remember.
lines.raw: I can't remember.  | 我记不起来了。

lines.english: The man who I served was wearing a hat.
lines.chinese: 我为之服务的那个人戴着一顶帽子。
lines.raw: The man who I served was wearing a hat.  | 我为之服务的那个人戴着一顶帽子。

lines.english: Have you got a hat, sir?
lines.raw: Have you got a hat, sir?  | 您有帽子吗，先生？

lines.english: Yes, I have.
lines.raw: Yes, I have.  | 是的，我有。

lines.english: Would you put it on, please?
lines.raw: Would you put it on, please?  | 请您戴上好吗？

lines.english: All right.
lines.raw: All right.  | 好的。

lines.english: Is this the man that you served, Caroline?
lines.chinese: 卡罗琳，这就是您为之服务过的那个人吗？
lines.raw: Is this the man that you served, Caroline?  | 卡罗琳，这就是您为之服务过的那个人吗？

lines.english: Yes.
lines.raw: Yes.  | 是的。

lines.english: I recognize him now.
lines.raw: I recognize him now.  | 我现在认出他了。
